zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：当前震荡整理，突破有望
zh.content:
当前，ETH/USD的价格保持在2384.29美元，处于震荡整理的阶段。价格在过去24小时内变化1.40%，高点和低点分别为2385美元和2340.74美元，显示出短期内市场情绪较为平稳，未出现明显的趋势突破。

从技术指标来看，RSI(14)未提供数据，但MACD的当前值为29.20333，表明短期内市场动能较强，可能支撑价格继续上涨。SMA(20)在2227.128美元的位置提供了一定的支撑，反映出价格相对较为健康，短期内可能维持震荡向上的走势。

在支撑位方面，2340.74美元的低点是关键支撑区间。如果价格跌破此水平，可能会迎来进一步的回调。上行阻力位在2385美元附近，若突破此处，价格有望进一步上行，挑战更高的水平。

建议投资者在当前震荡区间内保持谨慎，建议设置止损于2340美元附近，等待价格突破2385美元时再进行跟进操作。此时，可考虑利用短期上涨波段进行交易，但需关注市场波动风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is showing a firm short-term uptrend as it hovers around $2384.29, recovering from a recent low of $2340.74. The 24-hour gain of 1.40% suggests sustained buying interest, especially after briefly touching support levels near $2340. The price remains well above the 20-period SMA at $2227, signaling that the market’s momentum is predominantly bullish. Traders should watch how ETH reacts around the intraday high of $2385, as breaking above this could open the way toward $2420–$2450.  

The MACD reading of 29.20 indicates moderate bullish momentum, even though the signal line is unavailable. This aligns with the upward move from the SMA, suggesting buyers maintain control. Absence of the RSI limits overbought/oversold insight, but the current price action and SMA support point to a continuation of upward bias unless significant selling pressure emerges. Monitoring volume spikes will be key to confirming the strength of the ongoing rally.  

Immediate support resides near $2340–$2350, reflecting the recent low, while psychological resistance is observed around $2385 and then at $2420. A failure to maintain above $2340 could trigger a retest of $2300, where longer-term SMA confluence might stabilize the market. Swing traders could consider incremental long positions near support zones with tight stops, whereas aggressive buyers may enter on a confirmed breakout above $2385, targeting the next resistance cluster.  

Cautious traders should watch for consolidation just below $2385, which may indicate short-term exhaustion. Short-term pullbacks are possible, particularly if broader market conditions weaken. Combining price action with SMA and MACD insights, ETH/USD presents opportunities for both trend-following and swing trading strategies. Maintaining discipline with risk management around identified support and resistance levels will be essential for capitalizing on potential upside without overexposure.
